101001000//starting idx at 0
101010011
110010101
101011011
110011111
010010011
010010001
011010010//r2 == mem[30 + idx]
000011010
101100111
110100011//r4 == {1110_0000}
001011100
001011011
101100001
110100101//r4 == {0000_1000}
001010100
001010010
110010111//r2 == {000,b1,_0000}
010010011
110010100//r2 == {0000_b4,b3,b2,b1}
101000011
110000101
101011011
110011111
010011000
101000001
010011000
010011001
011011011//r3 == mem[30 + idx + 1]
110011101
101000001
110000001
101100111
110100100
010100000//r4 == {1111_0000}
001100011
001100100
010010100//r2 == {b8,b7,b6,b5_b4,b3,b2,b1}
100001010//mem[idx] == [b8:b1]
101010111
001010011
001010010
101011001
010011001
100011010//mem[idx + 1] == [0000_0{b11:b9}]
101000011
110000010
101011011
110011100
010011000//r3 == {1111_0000}
011100001//r4 == mem[idx]
001011100
001011011
000010011
101011001
010011001
011011011//mem[idx + 1]
101100111//r4 == {0000_0111}
001011100
001011011
101100001
110100010
010010011//r2 == {b8,b7,b6,b5_0,b11,b10,b9}
100100110//store q8 at mem[64]
011010001//r2 == mem[idx]
101000001
110000001
101100111
110100111
010100000//r4 == {1000_1110}
001010100
001010010
101000001
101100001
110100010
010100000
110011100//r3 == {0,b11,b10,b9_0000}
010010011//r2 == {b8,b11,b10,b9_b4,b3,b2,0}
100100110//store q4 at mem[65]
011010001//r2 == mem[idx]
101000011
110000011
101100011
110100110
010100000
101000001
010100000//r4 == {0110_1101}
001010100
001010010
101100011
110100011//r4 == {0110_0000}
000101010
001100101
001100100
110100111//r4 == {b7,b6,00_0000}
101000001
101101011
110101110
010101000//r5 == {0000_1101}
001010101
001010010
110010110
010010100//r2 == {b7,b6,b4,b3,_0,b1,00}
101000011
110011101
001011000
001011011
101000010
101100001
110100010
010100000
010010011//r2 == {b7,b6,b4,b3,_0,b1,b11,b10}
100100110//store q2 at mem[66]
011010001//r2 == mem[idx]
101000001
110000101
101011101
110011100
010011000
101000011
010011000//r3 == {0101_1011}

000101100

101000001
110000001

101000001

101000011
101101001
110101101
010101000//r5 == {0000_1011}
001011101
001011011
110011110//r3 == {00,b4,0_b2,b1,0,0}
000010011
010010100//r2 == {b7,b5,b4,0_b2,b1,0,0}
101011001
010011001
011011011//r3 == mem[idx + 1]
101100111//r4 == {0000_0111}
001011100

000100011
101000100
001100000
001100100
110100001//r4 == {0000_00,b11,0}
101000001

010011100//r3 == {0000_00,b11,b9}
101000011

110100010
010100000
010010011//r2 == {b7,b5,b4,0_b2,b1,b11,b9}
100100110//store q1 at mem[67]
101000011
110000101

011010010//r2 == mem[30 + idx]

010100000
101000000
010010000
100100110//mem[68] == parity of {b4:b1,p4:p1}
101000011
110000101
101011011
110011111
010011000
101000001
010011000
010011001
011011011//r3 == mem[30 + idx + 1]
101000101

110100010
010100000
101000000
010011000
100100110//mem[69] == parity of {b11:b5,p8}
101000100
101011001
110011010
010011000
011100011//r4 == mem[68] aka parity of {b4:b1,p4:p1}
101000001
010011000
011011011//r3 == mem[69] aka parity of {b11:b5,p8}
110011001
101000100
101101001
110101010
010101000
010011100//r3 == {p,000_000,p}
100101110//store q0 at mem[68]
101000011
110000101
101010011
110010111
010010000
010010001

111011000//s0 != 1, no error or two errors go to increment loop
101011001
010011001
011100011//r4 == mem[idx + 1]
101000001
110000010
010100000//set single error flag
100011100//store the flag
101000011
110000101
101011011
110011111
010011000//r3 == {0001_1110}
001010011

110010001//r2 == {0000_s8,s4,s2,s1}

111010011//b1 is wrong if {0011}

101000000

100011100//mem[idx + 1] is error correct for b11
101000000

111000011//always branch to increment idx
101010000
101011001
111010011//parity error
101000001//two error detection
110000001
101111111
010111000
101000000
111010000
101000001
110000001
101111001
110111101
010111000
111111000
101010001
010010001
011011010//r2 == mem[idx + 1]
101000001
110000001
010011000//set double error flag
100010011//store the flag
101010011//begin increment
110010101
101011011
110011111
010010011
101000010
010001000
111001010//idx += 2 and if idx != 30
